notes: The simulator core and minimum theme runtime build outside this repository.
The current macOS configure path selects GCC 16; the feasibility recipe uses a generated-Makefile Apple Clang override and excludes codec/plugin shared objects.

Rockbox selects its SDL thread fallback on this host. A newly installed stock simulator disk rendered stock configuration in the Phase 4 harness, while the prepared minimum runtime used by the checked evidence loaded the authored theme.

prototypeStages.name: Build one native simulator target reproducibly
prototypeStages.evidence: Pinned iPod Video simulator core, minimum runtime, binary hash, and documented external recipe.

prototypeStages.name: Automate loading a generated theme
prototypeStages.evidence: Phase 4 installs an authored SBS and deterministic settings into a private simulator disk.

prototypeStages.name: Capture screenshots
prototypeStages.evidence: Two clean firmware framebuffer captures have the same normalized pixel hash.

prototypeStages.name: Port the display and input loop to WebAssembly
prototypeStages.evidence: No GPL WebAssembly derivative was started before resolving distribution, runtime, and maintenance architecture.

prototypeStages.name: Run a single target in browser
prototypeStages.evidence: A browser target cannot be claimed until the display/input port is implemented and validated.

prototypeStages.name: Add target switching
prototypeStages.evidence: The plan forbids target switching before one browser target is stable.

browserPortConstraints.finding: The simulator, firmware UI, codecs, and plugins are GPL-2.0-or-later source. Serving a modified WebAssembly build needs an explicit source, notices, delivery, and update policy.
browserPortConstraints.resolution: Approve a GPL-compatible distribution and source-delivery architecture before compiling browser artifacts.

browserPortConstraints.finding: Configure generates target headers and only handles named native host systems. Its Darwin path selects GCC 16, native SDL flags, dlopen, and Mach-O shared-library settings.
browserPortConstraints.resolution: Add and maintain an upstreamable Emscripten host/toolchain path rather than patching generated outputs for production.

browserPortConstraints.finding: The simulator maps Rockbox tasks to SDL threads, mutexes and semaphores, uses setjmp/longjmp for exits, and blocks in SDL_WaitEvent. Browser code must yield to the event loop.
browserPortConstraints.resolution: Choose pthreads with cross-origin isolation or redesign the scheduler/event loop, then measure responsiveness and shutdown behavior.

browserPortConstraints.finding: Playback codecs and plugins are separate objects loaded at runtime through SDL_LoadObject/SDL_LoadFunction.
browserPortConstraints.resolution: Choose and validate static linking or Emscripten main/side modules; dynamic linking plus pthreads remains a high-risk combination.

browserPortConstraints.finding: Rockbox expects a synchronous mutable simulator disk rooted at sim_root_dir, including themes, fonts, settings, databases, media, screenshots, codecs, and plugins.
browserPortConstraints.resolution: Define preloaded MEMFS assets, IDBFS synchronization, imports, quotas, reset semantics, and exact editor-to-simulator mounting.

browserPortConstraints.finding: SDL audio callbacks participate in PCM completion while Rockbox timing reads SDL ticks across scheduled tasks.
browserPortConstraints.resolution: Prototype user-gesture audio startup, callback scheduling, background throttling, and deterministic non-audio theme mode.

browserPortConstraints.finding: The measured native core excludes codec/plugin objects; a useful Level C bundle also needs target runtime assets, browser glue, persistence, and an upstream refresh process.
browserPortConstraints.resolution: Set load-time, memory, bundle, browser-support, and upstream-update budgets before product integration.

externalReferences.title: Emscripten pthreads support
externalReferences.relevance: SharedArrayBuffer, COOP/COEP, worker pool, and separate threaded/non-threaded builds.

externalReferences.title: Emscripten runtime environment
externalReferences.relevance: Browser main-loop yielding, virtual filesystems, MEMFS, and IDBFS.

externalReferences.title: Emscripten File System API
externalReferences.relevance: Synchronous virtual filesystem and asynchronous persistent storage synchronization.

externalReferences.title: Emscripten dynamic linking
externalReferences.relevance: Main/side modules, runtime dlopen, code-size effects, and experimental pthread interaction.

externalReferences.title: Emscripten setjmp/longjmp support
externalReferences.relevance: Compatibility modes and code-size/performance implications for simulator thread exits.

externalReferences.title: Emscripten audio guidance
externalReferences.relevance: Event-loop yielding and browser user-gesture requirements for audio.

productBoundary.nextDecision: Choose whether Rockbox Designer will distribute and maintain a GPL Level C runtime; do not start the WebAssembly port before that choice.
